commandText:
CREATE TABLE "Students" (
    "Id" uuid NOT NULL,
    "FullName" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "DateOfBirth" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "Email" character varying(100),
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Students" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);
